Atom Oracle ESP32

Flash the Atomic Pulse firmware. The firmware embeds a zero-import WebAssembly module and runs it on the ESP32 with wasm3.

wasmatom_score(6,6) = 288
pulsepulse(12) = 78
targetESP32 devkit / Arduino
Use Chrome or Edge on desktop. Web Serial is required. Serve this page from HTTPS or localhost before flashing.

Manifest: manifest-atom-oracle.json. Firmware binaries are staged from the PlatformIO build by ./stage.sh.
